parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM `service-desk-472314.coherent_voice_dataset.adsim_products_digitalProgramming` ORDER BY PRODUCT_ID DESC

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.adsim_products_digitalProgramming(
  PRODUCT_ID,
  PRODUCT_NAME,
  DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ID,
  DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE,
  DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT
) VALUES (
  {{ $json["PRODUCT_ID"] }},
  '{{ ($json["PRODUCT_NAME"] || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json["DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ID"] || 0 }},
  {{ $json["DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE"] 
       ? "'" + $json["DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE"].substring(0,10) + "'" 
       : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json["DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT"] || 0 }}
)
ON CONFLICT (PRODUCT_ID) DO UPDATE SET
  PRODUCT_NAME                    = EXCLUDED.PRODUCT_NAME,
  DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ID          = EXCLUDED.DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ID,
  DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT = EXCLUDED.DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ITEMS_COUNT,
  DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE = EXCLUDED.DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_REGISTER_DATE;


DELETE FROM public.adsim_products_digitalProgramming a
USING public.adsim_products_digitalProgramming b
WHERE a.ctid < b.ctid
  AND a.PRODUCT_ID = b.PRODUCT_ID
  AND a.DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ID = b.DIGITAL_PROGRAMMING_ID;
